scope: per-query query_id alignment verification for the 94.0 cohort gate
learner_facing_quality_improvement: The qrel verifier now rejects baseline cohort reports whose per-query records silently drift from the 200-query fixture, so learner-facing RAG regressions cannot hide behind matching totals while one query result is duplicated and another is dropped.
notes: This wave stayed inside the qrel verifier, its narrow unit test, and the lane-local baseline report artifact.
The repaired baseline report had one duplicated query_id and was missing symptom_to_cause:deadlock_after_index_change_mixed:001 before this wave.
